_description: Test vectors generated from the Python Reticulum reference implementation. All byte values are lowercase hex strings. These are ground truth for rns-rs wire format compliance testing.

constants._description: Fundamental protocol constants from the Python reference

_steps: addr_material = name_hash [+ identity_hash if not PLAIN]
addr_material = name_hash [+ identity_hash if not PLAIN]

addr_material = name_hash [+ identity_hash if not PLAIN]
addr_material = name_hash [+ identity_hash if not PLAIN]

data_packet_vectors._description: ENCRYPTED DATA packet to alice — payload=b'secret message'
data_packet_vectors._note: ciphertext = ephemeral_X25519_pub[32] || AES_IV[16] || aes_body. Decrypt with recipient X25519 prv via ECDH -> HKDF -> AES-128-CBC.

data_packet_vectors._description: ENCRYPTED DATA packet to alice — payload=b'van: temp=68 bat=87 heater=off'
data_packet_vectors._note: ciphertext = ephemeral_X25519_pub[32] || AES_IV[16] || aes_body. Decrypt with recipient X25519 prv via ECDH -> HKDF -> AES-128-CBC.

announce_packet_vectors._note: With app_data, signature covers: dest_hash||pub_key||name_hash||rand_hash||app_data. app_data is appended AFTER the signature in the payload.
With app_data, signature covers: dest_hash||pub_key||name_hash||rand_hash||app_data. app_data is appended AFTER the signature in the payload.
With app_data, signature covers: dest_hash||pub_key||name_hash||rand_hash||app_data. app_data is appended AFTER the signature in the payload.

signing_vectors._description: Ed25519 sign — identity='alice' msg=b'hello from reticulum'

Ed25519 sign — identity='bob' msg=b'hello from reticulum'
Ed25519 sign — identity='bob' msg=b'van telemetry packet'

packet_hash_vectors._formula: hashable_part = (raw[0] & 0x0F) || raw[2:]  [HEADER_1]. packet_hash = SHA-256(hashable_part)  [32 bytes, full, NOT truncated]

packet_hash_vectors._note: Identical to hops=0 hash above — hops byte excluded from hashable_part
